name: Punchy
description: FxSound-style aggressive — bass +8 dB, full compression, max squash. The original BigSound v0.4 feel that had users saying 'passthrough is less than half the volume'. Pushes harder than the auto Laptop Speaker profile (more sub thump, more presence, wider image) so the impact is obvious on any hardware. Good on laptops, car speakers, or anywhere you want obvious impact. Fatiguing on good headphones.
